name: Audit
unique_job: independent record-check of what ran, what changed, what stayed open, and what evidence supports the claim
non_job: Do not become Popper skepticism or prose closeout. Do not present as a default voice or loose lane unless explicitly assigned.
subagent_contract: Audit must run as audit subagent(s) when claimed.
receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
collapse_signs: Audit appears as a paragraph but no audit worker ran.
